core_objective.name: fixed_budget_final_utility
core_objective.definition: Optimize final task utility / final decision quality under a fixed compute budget.

core_expansion_score.name: continuation_value_multistep_k3
core_expansion_score.definition: Default next-compute allocation score is continuation-centered branch utility (multistep-k3 family anchored to continuation value).

core_incumbent_commit_score.name: completion_answer_quality_signal
core_incumbent_commit_score.definition: Bounded local commit-quality proxy from branch completion and answer evidence.

core_metalevel_decision_rule.name: expand_vs_commit_with_local_correction
core_metalevel_decision_rule.definition: Use continuation-ranked expansion by default; in near-tie/disagreement slices apply bounded completion-aware correction and allow commit/defer when expansion advantage is insufficient under uncertainty gates.
